LanguageData.HAR_OT_BaseMeleeWeapon_a.description:
A mysterious weapon wielded by the Outerms.
It throbs with a disturbingly organic pulse, as if it were alive.
It is said to grow sharper with each enemy it kills.

It is infamous as a cursed weapon whose bearers often descend into wanton slaughter.




Kill, as desire compels you. Heap the corpses higher, ever more cruelly.
Our lord desires the unnamed thing. Paint the weary, faded story in vivid blood.
The bottomless void watches you. At every moment, forever and ever.
LanguageData.HAR_OT_Weapon_a.label: Phasma Xiphos
LanguageData.HAR_OT_Weapon_a.description:
A mysterious weapon wielded by the Outerms.
It throbs with a disturbingly organic pulse, as if it were alive.
It is said to grow sharper with each enemy it kills.

It is infamous as a cursed weapon whose bearers often descend into wanton slaughter.




Kill, as desire compels you. Heap the corpses higher, ever more cruelly.
Our lord desires the unnamed thing. Paint the weary, faded story in vivid blood.
The bottomless void watches you. At every moment, forever and ever.
LanguageData.HAR_OT_Weapon_a.tools.0.label: Miserosinos
LanguageData.HAR_OT_Weapon_b.label: Phasma Pelekys
